suppress.notes: False positive fixed by dependencyCheck plugin v12+ so need to upgrade uk.gov.hmcts.java past 0.12.67 when a new non broken version is available - https://github.com/dependency-check/DependencyCheck/issues/8249
False positive caused by incorrect change made seen in change history on NVD side - https://github.com/dependency-check/DependencyCheck/issues/8343
